update.readyToInstallDesc: We recommend backing up your data before installing. Save your work first.

credentialVault.title: Credential Vault
credentialVault.description: NovelAI credentials are encrypted by the native vault. Plaintext exists only while this app session is unlocked.
credentialVault.passphraseSessionOnly: The passphrase is used for this session and is not saved by NAIS blue.
credentialVault.saved: Credential saved in the encrypted vault
credentialVault.deleteConfirmationDescription: Generation with this slot will remain unavailable until another credential is registered.
credentialVault.migrationRequired: Legacy credentials must be moved to the vault
credentialVault.migrationRequiredDescription: Unlock or create the vault to finish the verified two-phase migration. Generation stays locked until it succeeds.
credentialVault.legacyBackupWarning: Legacy backups may still contain credentials
credentialVault.legacyBackupWarningDescription: Backups created by older releases must be treated as sensitive. Cleanup permanently deletes managed backup files that contain credential fields.
credentialVault.cleanupConfirmationDescription: This scans NAIS blue-managed local and disk backups without revealing values, then deletes entire backup artifacts that contain legacy NovelAI or R2 credentials. This cannot be undone.
credentialVault.cleanupIncomplete: Some legacy backups could not be cleaned

errors.unavailable: The native encrypted vault is unavailable. No plaintext storage is used instead.
errors.locked: Unlock the vault to use credentials.
errors.wrong-passphrase: The vault could not be unlocked with that passphrase.
errors.not-found: A referenced credential is missing. Register a replacement.
errors.readback-failed: The encrypted credential could not be verified after writing.
errors.operation-failed: The credential vault operation failed without changing to plaintext storage.

tokenRequired.title: Credential Vault Unlock Required
tokenRequired.desc: Unlock the credential vault or register a NovelAI token.

errorOccurred.title: Error Occurred
errorOccurred.desc: An error occurred during image generation.

toast.noMetadataDesc: No metadata found in this image

scene.title: Scene Mode
scene.description: Save prompts as cards and batch generate
scene.noScenesDesc: Add your first scene to get started
scene.promptHint: Prompts are combined: Base + Additional + Scene + Detail
scene.dropImportDesc: Drop JSON file to import preset
scene.exportSelectedZip: Export selected scene images as ZIP
scene.clearAllFavoritesInSelected: Clear all favorites in selected scenes
scene.deleteAllImagesInSelected: Delete all images in selected scenes

composition.externalConflictDescription: Resolve the repository revision conflict before editing.

workspace.moduleStackHelp: Choose a recipe module, then inspect or edit it.
workspace.inspectorHelp: Review module context before opening the canonical editor.

module.selectToInspect: Select a module to inspect its resolved state.

conflict.label: Conflict
conflict.review: Review the repository conflict before generating.

plan.title: Resolved plan
plan.help: Inspect prompts, parameters, random trace, and provenance.

composition.outputCapabilityFallbackTitle: Output destination changed for this platform

preset.title: Preset Manager
preset.description: Save and load prompts and settings as presets.

metadata.title: Load Metadata
metadata.description: Extract generation settings from image and apply to preset.
metadata.dropHint: Drag an image to load its metadata
metadata.noDataDesc: No metadata found in this image.
metadata.appliedDesc: Selected settings have been applied to preset.
metadata.extractDesc: Extract prompts and settings from PNG file
metadata.vibeDesc: Original image missing; restoring encoded Vibe data.
metadata.charRefWarning: Character Reference detected. Extraction supported via Director Tools.

queue.title: Queue Center
queue.selectScenesDescription: Choose scenes from any folder and set the generation count for each scene.
queue.enqueuedCount: {{count}} jobs are ready in Queue Center.
queue.enqueueFailed: Couldn't add this to the queue. Please try again shortly.
queue.legacyRetained: Transfer records current parameters and keeps existing item counts available for rollback.
queue.convertLegacyDescription: Current parameters and required resources will be captured for background jobs. Existing item counts remain available for rollback.

organizer.title: Organize and export results
organizer.description: Originals stay unchanged. Exports are created as copies, with optional cloud upload.
organizer.empty: No PNG, WebP, or JPEG images are in this collection.
organizer.assignmentHelp: Press Enter for the next empty slot, or drag and drop an image into a slot.
organizer.exportDescription: File names and conflicts are checked before a copy is created in the selected collection.
organizer.selectImageForFilenamePreview: Select an image to preview its distribution filename.
organizer.invalidRemoteKey: Invalid remote key; remove empty, traversal, or backslash segments before executing.
organizer.selectImageForOperationPreview: Select an image to determine copy, rename, conversion, and metadata-strip work.
organizer.copyRenameStripMetadata: Copy / rename + raw metadata strip (original pixels remain untouched).
organizer.copyRenamePreserveBytes: Copy / rename (original container bytes are preserved in a new distribution variant).
organizer.distributionSucceeded: Distribution committed. The original was left unchanged.
organizer.distributionFailed: Distribution failed. Use Retry failed to re-run only failed items.
organizer.selectImageForConflictPreview: Select an image to check conflicts.
organizer.initialStatus: Choose an image, press Enter to place it in the next empty slot, then run a distribution.
organizer.collectionReady: {{count}} supported images are ready for virtual browsing.
organizer.collectionReadFailed: This collection could not be read. Check the platform capability or choose another folder.
organizer.destinationAvailable: Available in the current preflight. The destination is checked again before the copy is created.
organizer.destinationConflict: Conflict preview: existing {{items}}. {{policy}} policy will apply at commit.
organizer.conflictPreviewUnavailable: Conflict preview is unavailable for this collection; commit will still preflight.
organizer.noEmptySlot: No empty slot is available. Clear a slot before assigning another image.
organizer.originalRegistrationFailed: The selected original could not be registered. It remains untouched.
organizer.duplicateAssignmentBlocked: Duplicate assignment is blocked; each artifact can occupy only one slot.
organizer.slotAssignmentRejected: That slot cannot accept this assignment.
organizer.folderSelectionUnavailable: Folder selection was unavailable. The app-managed collection is still available.
organizer.selectImageBeforeDistribution: Select an image before running a distribution.
organizer.distributionStartFailed: Distribution could not start. The original remains unchanged.
organizer.retryCompleted: Retried {{distributionCount}} failed distribution item(s) and {{remoteCount}} R2 follow-up item(s).
organizer.retryFailedMessage: Retry could not complete. Existing successful variants were not changed.
organizer.assignNextSlotAria: {{fileName}}. Press Enter to assign the next empty slot.
organizer.losslessWebpUnsupported: This WebView cannot prove lossless WebP conversion. The task will fail safely; choose PNG or preserve an existing WebP.
organizer.noDiagnostics: No organizer diagnostic has been recorded in this session.

wrapper.legacyDescription: Legacy JSON import, R2 scope, and Python verification tools. They are not merged automatically into the Composition v2 draft.
wrapper.authorityCaption: Composition Domain v2 repository command authoring

header.title: Asset Module Studio · Composition v2
header.description: Validate the repository command draft, then commit it explicitly. Editing does not perform full disk writes.

filters.empty: No modules match the current filters.

module.emptyEditor: Create or select a module to edit.

contributions.title: Prompt contributions
contributions.description: Choose canonical PromptTarget and merge mode instead of a free-text target.

authoring.paramsDescription: Empty values inherit from the parent layer.
authoring.characterDescription: Edit prompt and position patches using character stable IDs.
authoring.outputDescription: Stores destination capability, filename, metadata, and collision settings without credentials.
authoring.randomDescription: Modules reference stable rule IDs; rules are edited as typed document entities.

recipe.title: Recipe editor
recipe.description: Step stable IDs own ordering. A module may be used by multiple steps.
recipe.orderedStepsDescription: The drag handle supports pointer and keyboard input; Up/Down is the explicit mobile and keyboard fallback.
recipe.missingReference: Missing reference — select an existing module to repair.

preview.title: Resolved preview
preview.description: The actual CompositionEngine result appears when a canonical engine request context is available.
preview.unavailable: Preview unavailable. The UI does not invent engine defaults.

conflict.title: 3-way merge
conflict.description: Compare the base, local draft, and external disk version, then choose a merge result for each field.

external.detected: External edit detected: disk revision {{diskRevision}}, local base revision {{localRevision}}.
external.dirtySuffix: The local draft prevented automatic reload.

capabilities.title: Platform capabilities
capabilities.externalWatchReason: The mobile app sandbox cannot watch an external profile file continuously.
capabilities.externalWatchAlternative: Import the profile explicitly, then refresh it with the system file picker.
capabilities.localTaggerReason: The desktop Python tagger sidecar is not bundled on mobile.
capabilities.localTaggerAlternative: Generate without local verification or verify tags in the desktop app.
capabilities.r2DeployReason: R2 deploy tooling requires the desktop sidecar and local Wrangler environment.
capabilities.r2DeployAlternative: Export locally and deploy from the desktop app or Wrangler CLI.

promptEditor.title: Prompt Library
promptEditor.emptyHelp: You can import NovelAI Prompt Editor exports or fragment prompt JSON. Fragment files become grouped tabs.
promptEditor.noTabs: No tabs yet. Add one with +.
promptEditor.noWindows: No prompt windows yet. Add one with +.
promptEditor.promptPlaceholder: Enter prompts separated by commas. Autocomplete is enabled while typing.
promptEditor.importFailedDescription: The selected file is not a Prompt Editor or fragment JSON export.

prompt.basePlaceholder: 1girl, beautiful, long hair, standing, looking at viewer...
prompt.additionalPlaceholder: blue eyes, smile, school uniform, ribbon...
prompt.detailPlaceholder: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed, absurdres...
prompt.negativePlaceholder: bad anatomy, low quality, blurry, worst quality...

fragmentDialog.title: Fragment Prompts
fragmentDialog.description: Save complex prompts as fragments and insert them efficiently. Type <Title> to substitute automatically.
fragmentDialog.label: Title (no brackets)

imageRef.title: Add Image Reference
imageRef.description: Where should this image be added?

smartTools.title: Smart Tools
smartTools.mosaicHint: Drag over image to apply mosaic
smartTools.analysisDescription: Analyze image tags and styles using WD Tagger and Kaloscope.
smartTools.modelDownloadNote: * WD Tagger requires initial model download (~200MB). Kaloscope requires internet connection.
smartTools.rembgPreviewDesc: Move the slider to compare original and result.
smartTools.mosaicEditorDesc: Drag your mouse to apply mosaic effect.

generate.emptyDescription: Open the prompt, enter your idea, then choose Generate

parameters.title: Advanced Settings
parameters.description: Configure generation parameters like Steps and CFG Scale.

history.title: History
history.emptyHint: Open the prompt to create your first image.

resolutions.addCustomDesc: Add a new resolution preset (auto-adjusted to multiples of 64)

library.title: Library
library.description: Manage generated images and view metadata
library.emptyDesc: Drag and drop images or generate new ones to build your collection.
library.renameDesc: Enter a new name for the select image.
library.dropHint: Drag and drop images to add
library.createStackDesc: Group selected images into a stack
library.editModeDesc: Select multiple images for batch editing

api.title: API Settings
api.description: Enter your NovelAI API token. The token is securely encrypted and stored.
api.tokenHelp: You can get your token from NovelAI account settings.
api.slot2Help: Add a second NovelAI token to use another account during dual-worker generation.
api.geminiKeyHelp: Get your API key from Google AI Studio

theme.title: Theme Settings
theme.fontSizeHelp: Adjust the font size of the prompt input areas.

save.title: Save Settings
save.description: Configure where generated images are saved.
save.folderHelp: Enter the subfolder name within Pictures folder.
save.absolutePathHelp: Images will be saved to this exact folder.

imageFormat.title: Image Format
imageFormat.description: Choose the format for generated images.
imageFormat.help: WebP offers smaller file sizes with similar quality. PNG provides lossless quality.

library.absolutePathHelp: Library files will be saved to this exact folder.

streaming.title: Streaming Generation
streaming.description: Show real-time progress during image generation

generationDelay.title: Generation Delay
generationDelay.description: Delay between batch generations to prevent API overload

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.enableHelp: Enable or disable global keyboard shortcuts.

backup.title: Data Backup
backup.description: Backup and restore all settings including character prompts, scene data, etc.
backup.exportDesc: Save all data as a JSON file.
backup.importDesc: Restore data from a JSON backup file.
backup.autoBackupDesc: Automatically create backup on app startup.
backup.autoSnapshotDesc: Create full app snapshots in the Pictures folder without changing the normal export/import format.
backup.storeSnapshotDesc: Keep per-store recovery snapshots after IndexedDB writes.
backup.restoreStoreSnapshotsDesc: Restore one store from a per-store automatic snapshot.
backup.restoreSnapshotsDesc: Restore a full automatic snapshot created by NAIS blue.
backup.snapshotCreatedDesc: {{count}} stores were written to the disk snapshot.
backup.snapshotRestartRequired: Restart is required to apply restored data.
backup.confirmRestoreDesc: This will overwrite current data with backup data. Continue?
backup.credentialReentryRequired: Credential re-entry required: NovelAI tokens and runtime account data are not restored.

i2i.title: Image to Image
i2i.description: Generate a new image based on an existing image.
i2i.strengthDesc: Higher values deviate more from original.

web.title: Tag Search Browser
web.description: Click a Quick Link or enter a URL to open the browser in this area.
web.iframeBlocked: This site does not allow embedding

promptGenerator.title: AI Prompt Generator
promptGenerator.description: Describe your scene and we will convert it to Danbooru tags
promptGenerator.inputPlaceholder: e.g. A girl drinking coffee at a cafe
promptGenerator.goToSettings: Please enter your API key in Settings

fragment.description: Manage fragment prompts to use dynamically in prompts.
fragment.countersResetDesc: All sequential counters have been reset.
fragment.createFirst: Create a new file with the + button.
fragment.selectFile: Select a file from the left
fragment.contentPlaceholder:
Enter one option per line.
Lines starting with # are comments.

Example:
long hair, blue eyes
short hair, red eyes
twintails, green eyes
fragment.importError: An error occurred while importing the file.
fragment.exportError: An error occurred while saving the file.
fragment.importAllError: An error occurred while importing the JSON file.

characterPanel.title: Character Prompts
characterPanel.positionHelp: Drag characters to set their position

styleLab.title: Personal Style Lab
styleLab.description: Generate artist-tag combinations and evolve preferred styles with an Elo arena and genetic algorithm.

toast.randomFailedDesc: There are too few artists or only duplicate combinations were generated.
toast.notEnoughArenaCandidatesDesc: The current league needs at least two combinations.
toast.notEnoughParentsDesc: At least two rated or total combinations are required.
toast.analysisArtistsAdded: Added {{count}} analyzed artists to the list
toast.analysisCombinationAdded: Added analysis result as a combination
toast.appliedToPrompt: Applied to the current additional prompt
toast.previewBusyDesc: Try again after the other image generation task finishes.

arena.title: Style Elo Arena
arena.description: {{count}} candidates in the current league · choosing updates Elo and records immediately.
arena.emptyDesc: If there are too few combinations, create random ones in Artists/Combos first.

manage.artistListDesc: Paste one artist per line or multiple artist tags separated by commas.
manage.randomDesc: Creates {{min}}-{{max}} artists with weights from {{minWeight}} to {{maxWeight}}.
manage.combinationsDesc: Manage favorites, locks, notes, and copy tags quickly.
manage.searchPlaceholder: Enter an artist or tag to find

empty.noCombinations: No combinations have been created yet.

evolve.title: Combination Evolution System
evolve.description: Breed favorite or highly rated combinations and mutate some tags/weights.

analyze.title: PNG Artist Tag Analyzer
analyze.description: Extract artist tags and weights from NAI/NAIS blue PNG metadata.
analyze.empty: Select PNG files to show analysis results here.

settings.templateDesc: Preview generation renders the current left prompt-panel values and artist combination into this template. It does not change the original prompt.
settings.autoPreviewBattleDesc: Automatically generate previews when a new pair of match candidates is picked.

tokenAssessment.title: Prompt size and token confidence
tokenAssessment.unavailable: Reliable token calculation is unavailable. Character counts reflect the final expanded base and enabled character prompts.

productGuidance.title: Getting started and recovery guide
productGuidance.description: Open only the section you need. No live generation or upload runs from this guide.

credential.title: 1. Credential Vault and NovelAI
credential.description: Unlock the vault and connect a verified credential.
credential.locked: The vault is locked. Unlock it before using a saved NovelAI credential.
credential.missing: No saved credential is ready. Open the vault to add and verify one.
credential.ready: A saved credential is available in the unlocked vault.

validation.title: 2. Safe validation
validation.description: Review the resolved plan before any network request.
validation.safe: Open Main and inspect the resolved plan, prompt sections, warnings, model, and output policy. Reviewing it does not send a NovelAI request.

output.title: 3. Output and privacy
output.description: Choose location, format, and metadata handling.

metadata.stripped: Strip image metadata and write sidecar

r2.title: 4. Optional R2
r2.description: Configure R2 only if remote asset storage is needed.

queue.title: 5. Queue Center
queue.description: Inspect retries, requeues, cancellations, and terminal outcomes.
queue.help: Queue Center exposes durable job state without changing worker, rotation, retry, or stale-result contracts.

absolutePath.reason: Mobile app sandboxes cannot write to arbitrary absolute desktop paths.
absolutePath.alternative: Use an app-scoped destination or the system file picker.

r2.reason: Native foreground R2 upload is not enabled in this mobile build.
r2.alternative: Review the profile on mobile and upload from the desktop app.

advanced.title: Advanced settings and diagnostics
advanced.help: DiagnosticCode values and model IDs remain untranslated so they can be matched in logs and support material.
